name: authelia
title: Authelia
description: Open-source authentication and authorization server providing two-factor authentication, single sign-on (SSO), and access control for your applications via a reverse proxy.

variables.name: HOST_PORT
variables.label: Host Port
variables.description: Port exposed on the host for Authelia web interface

variables.name: AUTHELIA_JWT_SECRET
variables.label: JWT Secret
variables.description: Secret key used for signing JWTs. Use a long random string (min 20 chars)

variables.name: AUTHELIA_SESSION_SECRET
variables.label: Session Secret
variables.description: Secret key used for encrypting session data. Use a long random string (min 20 chars)

variables.name: AUTHELIA_STORAGE_ENCRYPTION_KEY
variables.label: Storage Encryption Key
variables.description: Encryption key for the storage backend. Use a long random string (min 20 chars)

variables.name: AUTHELIA_DEFAULT_REDIRECTION_URL
variables.label: Default Redirect URL
variables.description: Default URL users are redirected to after authentication (e.g. https://home.example.com)
